category_sources: source_facts.description says it switches kubectl contexts and aliases; official README says kubectx switches contexts and kubens switches namespaces.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official GitHub repository name are kubectx.
docs_sources: kubectx.dev redirects to the official GitHub repository; official README contains examples, installation, and usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/ahmetb/kubectx, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify kubectx/kubens context and namespace tools; official GitHub topics include kubernetes, kubectl, kubectl-plugins, and kubernetes-clusters.
